optionA.text: With three or more pairs of thoracic tori

optionB.text: With two pairs of thoracic tori

optionA.text: With four or more pairs of thoracic tori or at least rudiments of a fourth pair present on the concave side

optionB.text: With three pairs of thoracic tori

optionA.text: With at least four complete thoracic tori present

optionB.text: With remnants of a fourth thoracic torus present

optionA.text: Four pairs of thoracic tori present

optionB.text: Approximately seven pairs of thoracic tori present

optionA.text: Side setae absent

optionB.text: Side setae present

optionA.text: Margins of collar fused to form dorsal tunnel

optionB.text: Margins of collar not fused

optionA.text: Dextrally coiled

optionB.text: Sinistrally coiled

optionA.text: Collar setae limbate

optionB.text: Collar setae of fin and blade construction

optionA.text: Thoracic uncini with simple, blunt anterior peg

optionB.text: Thoracic uncini with broadly indented anterior peg

optionB.text: Sinistrally coiled

optionB.text: Collar setae simply limbate

optionB.text: Collar setae of fin and blade construction

optionA.text: Collar fused dorsally to form tunnel

optionB.text: Collar not fused dorsally

optionA.text: Incubation of larvae in opercular chamber; abdominal setae with blades as those of the collar setae

optionB.text: Incubation in the tube; abdominal setae very small with short blades

optionA.text: Thoracic uncini with several rows of teeth

optionB.text: Thoracic uncini with a single row of teeth

optionA.text: Two or more opercular plates on top of each other on the operculum

optionB.text: A single opercular plate present

optionB.text: Side setae absent

optionB.text: Collar setae simply limbate

optionB.text: Larvae attached to stalk in faecal groove

optionA.text: Tube tightly coiled along its whole length

optionB.text: Tube coiled only basally, most of the tube uncoiled

optionA.text: Three thoracic tori and four fascicles of setae on the convex side; four thoracic tori and five fascicles of setae on the concave side

optionB.text: Fourth setiger represented by a rudiment of the torus on the concave side

optionB.text: Dextrally coiled

optionA.text: Side setae present

optionB.text: Side setae absent

optionB.text: Collar setae of fin and blade construction
